The '''''Mist''''' was an [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
Along with the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Qork]]'', ''Mist'' delivered supplies to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
